Book Eye Test

Digital Eye Testing

Vision diagnostics, measured to perfection.

A 30-45 minute comprehensive eye exam combining the latest clinical-grade equipment with the kind of unhurried attention that boutique optical deserves.

Book your testWhatsApp us

What's included

A complete visual workup.

Every test goes well beyond a prescription — we screen for conditions you may not even know to ask about.

Computerized refraction

Auto-refractometer readings accurate to 0.25 dioptre, refined by manual phoropter verification.

Retinal screening

Fundus imaging to detect early signs of diabetic retinopathy, hypertensive changes and macular health.

Slit-lamp examination

High-magnification assessment of cornea, conjunctiva, iris and lens for clinical-grade ocular health.

Binocular vision check

Coordination, focusing and eye-muscle balance — essential for IT professionals and avid readers.

Paediatric assessment

Child-friendly testing using picture optotypes, retinoscopy and cycloplegic refraction when needed.

Progressive lens consultation

Detailed lifestyle questionnaire and frame measurements to recommend the right corridor and design.

The Eylux 7-step exam

How your appointment unfolds.

01

Welcome & lifestyle conversation

02

Auto-refraction & visual acuity

03

Manual refinement with phoropter

04

Binocular balance & near vision

05

Ocular health screening

06

Lens & frame recommendation

07

Try-on, fitting & order

Begin the journey

Book your eye test
today.

Walk into our Hadapsar boutique for a complimentary consultation. We'll measure, advise and craft the perfect pair — together.
